name: Sino Bioenergy Corp.
summary: Sino Bioenergy Corp., a technology company, builds, owns, and operates plasma conversion biomass gas system facilities to convert municipal solid waste into green power and other valuable products. The company process municipal household waste, construction waste, kitchen waste, and sludge to produce and sell organic, as well as mixed organic and inorganic fertilizers. It also produces other end products, such as plastic wood products, building materials, and bio-fuel blocks. The company was formerly known as Sino Fibre Communications, Inc. and changed its name to Sino Bioenergy Corp. in December 2010. Sino Bioenergy Corp. was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
